since_last: 36% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.85% · Gold +0.34% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 36% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.31%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SYNA is the standout at +7.63%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +7.63%, EQIX +3.17%, FTNT +2.18%, PLTR +1.86%, NOW +1.59%. Laggards: CEVA -5.11%, ARM -3.73%, MU -3.67%, TER -3.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.58% at $150.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
